content.hint: 回答应指出具体的植物种类，而不是养护方法或物品
content.situation: 朋友提到他最近开始养盆栽，你对此很感兴趣，想了解他最喜欢的植物和原因
content.speakerText: So you started growing houseplants? What’s your favorite one?
content.speakerTextCn: 所以你开始养室内植物了？你最喜欢哪一种？
content.knowledgePoint: 使用具体名词表达个人偏好
content.responseTemplate: I’m really into ___ because it’s so easy to care for.

content.hint: 回答应描述一个具体的感官体验，而非感受或物品
content.situation: 同事说他周末去爬山了，你很感兴趣，想问他途中最难忘的瞬间
content.speakerText: You hiked last weekend? What was the most surprising part?
content.speakerTextCn: 你上周末去爬山了？最让你惊讶的是什么？
content.knowledgePoint: 用感官细节描述难忘瞬间
content.responseTemplate: I didn’t expect to hear ___ — it was so sudden!

content.hint: 回答应表达情绪或成就感，而不是行为或具体信息
content.situation: 你听说朋友在学弹吉他，想问他第一次成功弹出完整歌曲时的感觉
content.speakerText: You’re learning guitar? What was it like when you played your first full song?
content.speakerTextCn: 你在学吉他？第一次完整弹出一首歌时感觉怎么样？
content.knowledgePoint: 用情感形容词表达成就感受
content.responseTemplate: I felt ___ — like I finally got it!

content.hint: 快速拿出相机的常用动词搭配
content.template: I was so excited I ______ my camera out right away.
content.knowledgePoint: 动词搭配（pull out a camera）

content.scenarioHint: 在社交聚会中，当对方提到自己最近参加了一次户外活动时，你想引导对方分享更多细节和感受
content.speakerText: You went hiking last weekend? That sounds amazing!
content.speakerTextCn: 你上周末去徒步了？听起来太棒了！
content.responseTemplate: What was the most surprising part of the trail?

blanks.answer: What was the most surprising part of the trail?
options: What was the most surprising part of the trail?
Did you like the hiking trail?

content.hint: 用‘most surprising part’来引导对方分享情感或感官上的意外体验，而不是简单询问事实
content.knowledgePoint: 使用开放式提问引导情感与细节分享

content.scenarioHint: 朋友提到他最近开始学习摄影，你想鼓励他分享一次特别的拍摄经历
content.speakerTextCn: 我听说你开始学摄影了——恭喜！
content.responseTemplate: What’s the one photo you’re most proud of?

blanks.answer: What’s the one photo you’re most proud of?
options: What’s the one photo you’re most proud of?
How much does a camera cost?

content.hint: 用‘the one photo you’re most proud of’来聚焦个人情感投入，激发故事性回应
content.knowledgePoint: 使用情感导向提问激发个性化分享
